narrative: Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz triggers a geopolitical risk premium as the Fed's hawkish debut under Chair Warsh lifts US borrowing costs; gold lower -1.72% near $4,173; equities +1.08%; DXY -0.09%; VIX 16.8. USD/JPY holds at 161.23 as 275bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets intervention risk, while USD/CAD firms to 1.4163 on a +275bp OIS advantage. Watch Tokyo CPI and Canadian Inflation on Tuesday for the next G10 policy catalysts.
